reason: Round02 preserves the 01_source regression path and avoids fit warnings, but the visual result is not accepted as a final product-quality match because headline scale and timeline text rhythm still differ from the source.

Timeline typography and headline occupancy still require source-vs-output repair before final product acceptance.
